brand.name: Spectra Flow
brand.description: Premium multi-tenant SaaS for AI-powered prospecting, lead qualification, email outreach, and CRM handoff.

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar, width 280px (w-72), dark theme applied exclusively to this section.
layout_and_spacing.main_content: Light theme, full height, properly padded (pt-8 px-8 pb-12).
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento grid protocol for Dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.cards: Flat solid surfaces. 1px border (border-slate-200), no heavy shadows. Rounded-xl for premium feel.

components.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary buttons use #1D4ED8 background. Minimalist styling, slight hover lift (-translate-y-[1px]).
components.tables: Premium data-dense tables for Leads Review. No vertical borders. Generous row padding (py-4). Hover state on rows.
components.drawers: Use Shadcn Sheet for Lead Detail Drawer. Slide in from right. Width 400px or larger.
components.forms: Shadcn Form primitives. Inputs have 1px border, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600/20.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs for multi-view (e.g., Settings, Campaigns).
components.badges: Used for lead statuses, tenant roles. Soft backgrounds with high contrast text.

key_functionalities_guidelines.dashboard: Top row: 4 KPI summary cards (col-span-1). Middle row: Wide charts (col-span-3) and Activity feed (col-span-1).
key_functionalities_guidelines.prospect_finder: Complex search form using grid layout. Clean inputs, clear primary 'Search' CTA.
key_functionalities_guidelines.job_progress_timeline: Vertical stepped timeline component showing stages of prospect scraping/cleaning.
key_functionalities_guidelines.leads_review_table: Data-rich table. Sticky header. Action menu (three dots) on the right for Approve/Reject/Details.
key_functionalities_guidelines.campaign_management: List of campaigns with status toggles (Active/Paused) and progress bars for completion.
key_functionalities_guidelines.email_template_editor: Rich text area (or structured textarea) with variable insertion tags (e.g., {{first_name}}).
key_functionalities_guidelines.crm_sync_panel: Card showing connected CRM (Espo CRM) status, last sync time, and manual 'Sync Now' button.
key_functionalities_guidelines.multilingual: Include a toggle in the top-right header for EN/ES. Implement using a simple React context or state for the MVP.
key_functionalities_guidelines.auth: Dark themed auth page to set the premium tone before entering the hybrid app.

icons.instructions: Use duotone or regular weights. Ensure sizes are consistent (w-5 h-5 for inline, w-6 h-6 for sidebar).

auth_background.description: Blue architectural abstract design used for the login/signup page background. Overlay with bg-black/50 for text readability.

empty_states.description: Black and white modern architecture used subtly for 'No Leads Found' or 'No Campaigns' empty states. Use low opacity (opacity-20) as a backdrop or framed asset.

accessibility_and_interactions.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-dashboard', data-testid='lead-approve-button').
accessibility_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons and links must have explicit hover states changing background or text color.
accessibility_and_interactions.focus_states: Inputs and buttons must have visible focus rings for keyboard navigation.
accessibility_and_interactions.animations: Subtle Framer Motion usage. Page transitions (fade in), list item stagger (for the leads table or job progress), and smooth drawer slides.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind config with Outfit and Manrope fonts.
Implement a hybrid layout: Sidebar uses dark classes hardcoded (bg-zinc-950 text-white), Main content uses light classes (bg-zinc-50 text-zinc-900).
Use Shadcn UI components extensively but customize them to remove the 'default Vercel look'. Use flat cards with 1px border and rounded-xl.
Implement the bilingual feature using a React Context holding translations for EN/ES, toggleable from the top header.
Ensure the Leads Review Table is responsive or has horizontal scrolling, utilizing Shadcn Table.
Use Shadcn Sheet for the Lead Detail Drawer.
Apply the data-testid convention strictly for QA.
